# pyqt-plugins

{{ PyPI }} {{ Pythons }} {{ GitHub }}

Perhaps docs will follow but for now see [the pyqt6-tools readme].  This
package provides just the PyQt plugins to avoid recompilation for every
adjustment of the wrappers.

[the pyqt6-tools readme]: https://github.com/altendky/pyqt-tools#pyqt-tools
